changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment:
Allow orders.user_id to be NULL after a user is hard-deleted, and switch the FK to ON DELETE SET NULL so the cascade happens at the DB layer (single source of truth, atomic with the user delete). Orders are retained for 7 years per AML — only the user link is severed.
OPS NOTE: orders is a partitioned table with ~24 monthly partitions. ADD CONSTRAINT validates existing rows against users(id), which scans every partition under SHARE ROW EXCLUSIVE — briefly blocks writes on orders during the migration. Run during a low-traffic window. All existing rows already satisfy the FK (the column was NOT NULL with the same target), so the validation is fast in practice.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE orders ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Same treatment for balance_transactions — kept for AML.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE balance_transactions ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE balance_transactions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_transactions_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Same treatment for balance_deposits — kept for AML.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE balance_deposits ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE balance_deposits DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_deposits_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: support_tickets — keep ticket history for compliance, sever user link.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE support_tickets ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE support_tickets DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_st_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: refill_requests — keep history, sever user link.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE refill_requests ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE refill_requests DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_rr_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE refresh_tokens DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_refresh_tokens_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE email_verification_tokens DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_evt_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE password_reset_tokens DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prt_user;

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE user_notification_prefs DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_unp_user;
